      • createReaderFactory

        public FormatReaderFactory createReaderFactory(RowType projectedRowType,
                                               @Nullable
                                               List<Predicate> filters)
        Description copied from class: FileFormat
        Create a FormatReaderFactory from the type, with projection pushed down.
        Specified by:
        createReaderFactory in class FileFormat
        Parameters:
        projectedRowType - Type with projection.
        filters - A list of filters in conjunctive form for filtering on a best-effort basis.
